verdict_reason: Controller endpoint calls non-existent service method and references missing AMEND status enum value required by AC3; implementation is incomplete.

todos.issue: Call to notificationService.amendNotification() which does not exist in NotificationService
todos.fix: Implement amendNotification() method in NotificationService that transitions notification from SUBMITTED to AMEND status and appends outbox event

todos.issue: AMEND status is used in endpoint but NotificationStatus enum only defines DRAFT, SUBMITTED, DELETED; AC3 requires AMEND status
todos.fix: Add AMEND value to NotificationStatus enum to support the amend workflow per AC3

todos.issue: submit endpoint description no longer accurately reflects the sole source state; updated description mentions both DRAFT and AMEND but should clarify the state machine
todos.fix: Update description to: 'Transitions notification status from DRAFT or AMEND to SUBMITTED' for clarity
